calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-03-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Barry Zelner, Esq. 310-274-9069 Law Offices for Plaintiff.
Petar Racic, Esq. 415-480-0471 Hassard & Bonnington LLP for Defendant.

ARGUED. Both sides argue. The Court comments. After argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

The Regents of the University of California's Motion for Summary Judgment, and in the alternative Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)
